title: The Ultimate List Of Affiliate Marketing Tips For SMBs and Startups
author: More by Nicole

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Want to grow yoursmall and medium business (SMB)without breaking the bank? Affiliate marketing could be your secret weapon. By partnering with trusted affiliates — bloggers, influencers, and businesses — you can expand your reach and only pay for actual results.81% of SMBs say customer referrals and affiliate marketing have helped them grow, making it a proven way to boost sales and build brand loyalty​. But running an affiliate program takes more than just signing up partners. The right strategy, AI-powered tools, and acustomer relationship management (CRM) systemcan help simplify tasks like tracking performance, managing partnerships, and personalizing offers.Artificial intelligence (AI)can analyze which affiliates bring in the most valuable customers, suggest commission adjustments, and improve targeting. In this guide, we’ll cover practical affiliate marketing tips for SMBs and startups.

inline_links.text: 81% of SMBs say customer referrals and affiliate marketing have helped them grow

sections.heading: What is affiliate marketing for growing your business?
sections.text: Affiliate marketingis a low-risk way for SMBs like yours to increasesaleswithout a large upfront investment. Instead of running expensive ads, you work with affiliates — partners who promote your products and earn a commission for each sale they bring in. This allows you to expand your reach while keeping costs tied to actual results. Every affiliate program includes: Your business (advertiser):The company offering the product or service.Affiliates (partners, influencers, and publishers):Individuals or businesses that promote your brand.Affiliate networks (optional):Platforms that track referrals and handle commission payouts. Affiliate marketing helps your small business increase visibility, attractloyal customers, andmanage marketing costsmore efficiently. Since you’re only paying for completedsales, it’s a sustainable strategy that grows with your business. Your success depends on choosing affiliates who truly connect with your audience. Look for partners who create relevant content, have a loyal following that trusts their recommendations, and use platforms where your customers already spend their time. When trust and alignment come together, your affiliate partnerships become much more effective.

sections.heading: Affiliate partnership tips: Building strong relationships
sections.text: Strong affiliate relationships take more than a commission structure — they require trust,communication, and the right support. When your partners feel valued, they’re more likely to create high-quality promotions that bring in the right customers. Here’s how you can set your affiliates up for success. Affiliates are an extension of your business. To ensure they represent your brand accurately, provide clear guidelines,marketing assets, and regular updates. UsingSlackfor real-time communication makes it easier for small businesses to answer questions, share promotions, and strengthen relationships. Affiliates perform better when they have access to ready-to-use content, promotional banners, and personalized links. AnAI CRMcan help you track which materials work best and tailor future resources to maximize results. AI capabilities likeAgentforcesimplify affiliate management by highlighting top affiliates, and recommending effective commission structures. Instead of manually tracking results, you can useAI-powered insightsto reward top performers and adjust incentives. WithPro Suite, you can automate performance tracking and use AI-driven recommendations to optimize your affiliate program. By using AI, you create a smarter, more efficient system that benefits both your business and your partners.

sections.heading: How to use AI for affiliate marketing
sections.text: Growing a successful affiliate program takes more than just bringing in partners. You need a clear strategy and tools that help you strengthen relationships and measure success. AI can simplify these processes by automating repetitive tasks and helping you makedata-drivendecisions. A dedicated partner page makes it easier for affiliates to sign up and access marketing materials. Instead of manually generating tracking links, automation tools can create unique referral links and update commission structures. With aCRM for small businesses, you can keep allpartner dataorganized and ensure affiliates have the tools they need to succeed. Different affiliates attract different audiences, so one-size-fits-all promotions don’t always work. AI can analyze customer behavior to suggest tailored product recommendations and create discount codes. Withsmall business marketing tools, you can create automated email campaigns and social ads that match affiliate audience preferences. AI-powered automationcan simplify every step of your affiliate program, from onboarding to helping with commission structures. How AI enhances targeting and personalization:Instead of relying on guesswork, AI can analyzeaffiliate performance and audience engagementto match the right promotions with the right customers. This makes sure that your highest-converting affiliates receive the most relevant offers and support, leading to better results. AI-driven analytics for better decision-making:Manually reviewing reports can be time-consuming, butAI-powered insightshighlight top-performing affiliates, detect patterns in customer behavior, and suggest ways to optimize commissions. Using anAI-powered CRM, you can track referrals, measure conversion rates, and makedata-backed adjustmentsto your program. Automating routine tasks to save time and resources:From tracking affiliate performance to processing payouts, automation can reduce manual workload and free up time for higher-value tasks. Withthe right CRM and AI-powered tools, routine processes like reporting, communication, and content updates can be handled automatically, allowing you to focus on building stronger relationships with your affiliates.

inline_links.text: the right CRM and AI-powered tools

sections.heading: AI tips for creating content that converts
sections.text: Affiliate content needs to do more than just inform — it should engage the audience, build trust, and encourage action. AI-powered tools, likeAI agents, can help fine-tune messaging, optimize content, and ensure that your affiliates are using the most effective language and formats to reinforce results. Not all affiliate audiences respond to the same messaging. Some prefer detailed product breakdowns, while others engage more with short, visually driven content. AI can analyze customer preferences, past engagement, and successful conversions to help affiliates tailor their approach. Usingsmall business marketing tools, you can provide pre-optimized email templates, social media posts, and blog structures that fit different audience segments. Guessing which content will perform well can lead to missed opportunities.AI-powered analyticstrack which headlines get the most clicks, whichcalls to action (CTAs)lead to conversions, and what kind of content format works best. By integrating these insights into aCRM, you can share real-time recommendations with affiliates, helping them refine their messaging for better performance. Creating consistent, high-quality content takes time.AI-powered tools with agentic capabilitiescan assist by suggesting product descriptions, crafting compelling email subject lines, and even generating short-form video scripts. Instead of affiliates starting from scratch, they can useAI-assisted contentto quickly adapt messaging for different platforms while keeping it aligned with your brand’s voice.

sections.heading: Automate your marketing, emails, and social media
sections.text: Marketingtakes time, and when you’re juggling affiliate relationships, social media, and email outreach, it can feel overwhelming. Automating key tasks helps you stay consistent, engage your audience, and make sure your affiliates have the right tools to succeed — without adding more to your plate. Affiliate links work best when they feel natural. Instead of just dropping a link, encourage your affiliates to: Share real experiences: A personal story or use case is more convincing than a generic promo.Use visuals and video: Short demos, customer testimonials, or behind-the-scenes content can grab attention.Include clear CTAs: A simple “Check this out” or “See how this works” can make all the difference. Keeping up with social media posting can be exhausting.AI-powered scheduling toolscan: Send out weeks of posts, tagged, and hashtagged with optimized AI.Analyze engagement trends to post when your audience is most active.Adjust content formatting for different platforms automatically.Track affiliate-drivenclicks and conversionsso you know what’s working. Affiliate marketing works best when it feels authentic.Trustis our number one value at Salesforce, and building it with customers is essential. Encourage affiliates to: Start real conversations: Reply to comments, answer questions, and engage with their audience.Tell their story: Why do they personally love the product? How has it helped them?Go beyond the promo: Live Q&As, behind-the-scenes looks, and user-generated content add credibility. The bigger your email list, the more people you can reach. Some easy ways to bring in more subscribers: Offer exclusive perks:Early access, special discounts, or free resources.Use AI insights to improve sign-ups:Test different opt-ins to see what works best.Time it right:Send invitations when engagement is highest, like after a purchase or social interaction. Writinggreat emailstakes time, but AI can take the guesswork out of the process. It can suggest subject lines that capture attention, tailor content based on how subscribers interact with your brand, and schedule follow-ups at the perfect moment — so no lead slips through the cracks. By using AI, you can spend less time on manual tasks and more time building real connections with your audience. Not every subscriber should get the same email. Segmentation helps you group customers based on their interests, while personalization tailors messages to their needs. AI can help you: Group contacts by interests, purchase history, or engagement level.Send personalized recommendations based on what they’ve browsed or bought.Automate re-engagement campaigns for subscribers who haven’t opened emails in a while.

sections.heading: Share your affiliate links on your online shop
sections.text: Youronline storeisn’t just where you sell — it’s where your affiliates send potential customers. When your shop is easy to navigate and optimized for conversions, you set both yourself and your partners up for success. Affiliates bring in traffic, but it’s up to you to turn visitors into buyers. AI can help you track which affiliate links drive the most sales, so you can refine your strategy and grow your business. Here’s how to make your shop moreaffiliate-friendly: Use link tracking to see which affiliates bring in the most engaged customers.Make product links easy to find by placing banners and call-to-action buttons where they naturally fit.Create a seamless checkout experience so visitors can complete their purchases quickly, no matter what device they’re using. Affiliate marketing works even better when your store appears in search results.Optimizing product pageshelps influence organic traffic and makes affiliate promotions even stronger. Key tactics include: Optimizing product descriptions:Use natural keywords to match how customers search.Creating high-quality content:Affiliate-friendly blogs, FAQs, and comparison pages can attract organic traffic.Improving site speed:Fast-loading pages reduce bounce rates and keep visitors engaged. A great affiliate program starts with a great experience for your customers.AI-powered toolshelp you understand their behavior, so you can recommend products they’ll love. They also personalize offers based on browsing history and highlight areas that need improvement — like slow-loading pages or high cart abandonment — so you can create a smoother, more rewarding shopping experience.

sections.heading: Track affiliate performance with AI
sections.text: Tracking affiliate performance isn’t just about countingsales— it’s about understanding which partners bring in the most valuable customers, which promotions work best, and where there’s room to improve. Instead of relying on spreadsheets or manual reports, AI can help you analyzereal-time data, identify patterns, and optimize your affiliate program with confidence. Not all clicks lead to sales, and not all sales bring long-term value. The most important metrics to track include: Conversion rate:How often do clicks from affiliate links turn into purchases? A highconversion rateusually means an affiliate is reaching the right audience.Average order value (AOV):Do affiliate-referred customers spend more per order? TrackingAOVhelps identify high-value partners.Customer lifetime value (CLV):Are affiliate-driven customers making repeat purchases, or do they only buy once? Affiliates bringing inloyal customers are worth investing in.Engagement rate:Are affiliate promotions driving meaningful interactions?High engagementsuggests strong audience trust. Sifting through reports manually takes time, and it’s easy to miss important insights.AI-powered analyticscan help you ‌identify top-performing affiliates and suggest increased commissions or exclusive offers. And detect fraudulent activity, like fake clicks or duplicate transactions. You can also predict which affiliates will likely generate long-term customers based on past behavior. All great performance metrics to let AI handle.

inline_links.text: loyal customers are worth investing in

sections.heading: Maintain trust and compliance in affiliate marketing
sections.text: Affiliate marketing relies on trust — Salesforce’s number one value. Ethical marketing and data protection help keep your program credible and compliant. Regulations like theFederal Trade Commission (FTC)’sdisclosure rules require affiliates to clearly state when they earn commissions. Disclosures should be easy to find, and promotions must be truthful. If affiliates receive free products, they must say so upfront. ACRM for small businesseshelps you share compliance guidelines and monitor content. Privacy laws likeGeneral Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) in Europeand theCalifornia Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)require transparency in data collection. AnAI-powered CRMcan help track permissions, secure customer data, and flag compliance risks. AI also scans affiliate content for missing disclosures and misleading claims, helping you maintain trust while protecting your business. (Back to top.)

raw_html:
Want to grow your small and medium business (SMB) without breaking the bank? Affiliate marketing could be your secret weapon. By partnering with trusted affiliates — bloggers, influencers, and businesses — you can expand your reach and only pay for actual results. 81% of SMBs say customer referrals and affiliate marketing have helped them grow, making it a proven way to boost sales and build brand loyalty​.

But running an affiliate program takes more than just signing up partners. The right strategy, AI-powered tools, and a customer relationship management (CRM) system can help simplify tasks like tracking performance, managing partnerships, and personalizing offers. Artificial intelligence (AI) can analyze which affiliates bring in the most valuable customers, suggest commission adjustments, and improve targeting. In this guide, we’ll cover practical affiliate marketing tips for SMBs and startups.

What is affiliate marketing for growing your business?

Affiliate marketing is a low-risk way for SMBs like yours to increase sales without a large upfront investment. Instead of running expensive ads, you work with affiliates — partners who promote your products and earn a commission for each sale they bring in. This allows you to expand your reach while keeping costs tied to actual results.

Every affiliate program includes:

  • Your business (advertiser): The company offering the product or service.
  • Affiliates (partners, influencers, and publishers): Individuals or businesses that promote your brand.
  • Affiliate networks (optional): Platforms that track referrals and handle commission payouts.

Affiliate marketing helps your small business increase visibility, attract loyal customers, and manage marketing costs more efficiently. Since you’re only paying for completed sales, it’s a sustainable strategy that grows with your business.

Your success depends on choosing affiliates who truly connect with your audience. Look for partners who create relevant content, have a loyal following that trusts their recommendations, and use platforms where your customers already spend their time. When trust and alignment come together, your affiliate partnerships become much more effective.

Market your SMB with Salesforce AI

Market To The Right Prospects With Starter Suite

6 AI Prompts For Small Business Marketing

5 Types Of AI Agents To Grow Your Business

AI Marketing: Insights From The Latest Small And Medium Business Trends Report

Affiliate partnership tips: Building strong relationships

Strong affiliate relationships take more than a commission structure — they require trust, communication, and the right support. When your partners feel valued, they’re more likely to create high-quality promotions that bring in the right customers. Here’s how you can set your affiliates up for success.

Keep communication open and clear

Affiliates are an extension of your business. To ensure they represent your brand accurately, provide clear guidelines, marketing assets, and regular updates. Using Slack for real-time communication makes it easier for small businesses to answer questions, share promotions, and strengthen relationships.

Give affiliates the right marketing tools

Affiliates perform better when they have access to ready-to-use content, promotional banners, and personalized links. An AI CRM can help you track which materials work best and tailor future resources to maximize results.

Use AI to optimize affiliate relationships

AI capabilities like Agentforce simplify affiliate management by highlighting top affiliates, and recommending effective commission structures. Instead of manually tracking results, you can use AI-powered insights to reward top performers and adjust incentives.

With Pro Suite, you can automate performance tracking and use AI-driven recommendations to optimize your affiliate program. By using AI, you create a smarter, more efficient system that benefits both your business and your partners.

How to use AI for affiliate marketing

Growing a successful affiliate program takes more than just bringing in partners. You need a clear strategy and tools that help you strengthen relationships and measure success. AI can simplify these processes by automating repetitive tasks and helping you make data-driven decisions.

Ready to go Pro?

Level up your CRM with the top-rated Pro Suite — the customer platform that scales with you.

Try it for free

Build a partner page and automate link generation

A dedicated partner page makes it easier for affiliates to sign up and access marketing materials. Instead of manually generating tracking links, automation tools can create unique referral links and update commission structures. With a CRM for small businesses, you can keep all partner data organized and ensure affiliates have the tools they need to succeed.

Personalize offers with AI-powered content

Different affiliates attract different audiences, so one-size-fits-all promotions don’t always work. AI can analyze customer behavior to suggest tailored product recommendations and create discount codes. With small business marketing tools, you can create automated email campaigns and social ads that match affiliate audience preferences.

Build out your affiliate program using automation

AI-powered automation can simplify every step of your affiliate program, from onboarding to helping with commission structures.

How AI enhances targeting and personalization: Instead of relying on guesswork, AI can analyze affiliate performance and audience engagement to match the right promotions with the right customers. This makes sure that your highest-converting affiliates receive the most relevant offers and support, leading to better results.

AI-driven analytics for better decision-making: Manually reviewing reports can be time-consuming, but AI-powered insights highlight top-performing affiliates, detect patterns in customer behavior, and suggest ways to optimize commissions. Using an AI-powered CRM, you can track referrals, measure conversion rates, and make data-backed adjustments to your program.

Automating routine tasks to save time and resources: From tracking affiliate performance to processing payouts, automation can reduce manual workload and free up time for higher-value tasks. With the right CRM and AI-powered tools, routine processes like reporting, communication, and content updates can be handled automatically, allowing you to focus on building stronger relationships with your affiliates.

Kickstart your SMB with Starter Suite

See results from day one with a CRM designed for SMBs — the all-in-one suite for productivity. It all starts with Starter Suite.

Try it for free

AI tips for creating content that converts

Affiliate content needs to do more than just inform — it should engage the audience, build trust, and encourage action. AI-powered tools, like AI agents, can help fine-tune messaging, optimize content, and ensure that your affiliates are using the most effective language and formats to reinforce results.

Write content that connects with your audience

Not all affiliate audiences respond to the same messaging. Some prefer detailed product breakdowns, while others engage more with short, visually driven content. AI can analyze customer preferences, past engagement, and successful conversions to help affiliates tailor their approach. Using small business marketing tools, you can provide pre-optimized email templates, social media posts, and blog structures that fit different audience segments.

Use AI for content optimization

Guessing which content will perform well can lead to missed opportunities. AI-powered analytics track which headlines get the most clicks, which calls to action (CTAs) lead to conversions, and what kind of content format works best. By integrating these insights into a CRM, you can share real-time recommendations with affiliates, helping them refine their messaging for better performance.

Generate promotions at scale

Creating consistent, high-quality content takes time. AI-powered tools with agentic capabilities can assist by suggesting product descriptions, crafting compelling email subject lines, and even generating short-form video scripts. Instead of affiliates starting from scratch, they can use AI-assisted content to quickly adapt messaging for different platforms while keeping it aligned with your brand’s voice.

Grow Your Small Business With AI Agents

Learn how autonomous AI can scale your small business for efficient growth in our free e-book.

Get it now

Automate your marketing, emails, and social media

Marketing takes time, and when you’re juggling affiliate relationships, social media, and email outreach, it can feel overwhelming. Automating key tasks helps you stay consistent, engage your audience, and make sure your affiliates have the right tools to succeed — without adding more to your plate.

Best practices for promoting affiliate links

Affiliate links work best when they feel natural. Instead of just dropping a link, encourage your affiliates to:

  • Share real experiences: A personal story or use case is more convincing than a generic promo.
  • Use visuals and video: Short demos, customer testimonials, or behind-the-scenes content can grab attention.
  • Include clear CTAs: A simple “Check this out” or “See how this works” can make all the difference.

Lean on AI for social media scheduling

Keeping up with social media posting can be exhausting. AI-powered scheduling tools can:

  • Send out weeks of posts, tagged, and hashtagged with optimized AI. 
  • Analyze engagement trends to post when your audience is most active.
  • Adjust content formatting for different platforms automatically.
  • Track affiliate-driven clicks and conversions so you know what’s working.

Engage with your audience to build trust

Affiliate marketing works best when it feels authentic. Trust is our number one value at Salesforce, and building it with customers is essential. Encourage affiliates to:

  • Start real conversations: Reply to comments, answer questions, and engage with their audience.
  • Tell their story: Why do they personally love the product? How has it helped them?
  • Go beyond the promo: Live Q&As, behind-the-scenes looks, and user-generated content add credibility.

Strategies for growing your email list

The bigger your email list, the more people you can reach. Some easy ways to bring in more subscribers:

  • Offer exclusive perks: Early access, special discounts, or free resources.
  • Use AI insights to improve sign-ups: Test different opt-ins to see what works best.
  • Time it right: Send invitations when engagement is highest, like after a purchase or social interaction.

Use AI to maximize your emails

Writing great emails takes time, but AI can take the guesswork out of the process. It can suggest subject lines that capture attention, tailor content based on how subscribers interact with your brand, and schedule follow-ups at the perfect moment — so no lead slips through the cracks. By using AI, you can spend less time on manual tasks and more time building real connections with your audience.

Not every subscriber should get the same email. Segmentation helps you group customers based on their interests, while personalization tailors messages to their needs. AI can help you:

  • Group contacts by interests, purchase history, or engagement level.
  • Send personalized recommendations based on what they’ve browsed or bought.
  • Automate re-engagement campaigns for subscribers who haven’t opened emails in a while.

What can you do with a CRM built to reach more prospects?

Automate your marketing campaigns with a CRM built to grow. It all starts with Starter Suite.

Find out for free

Share your affiliate links on your online shop

Your online store isn’t just where you sell — it’s where your affiliates send potential customers. When your shop is easy to navigate and optimized for conversions, you set both yourself and your partners up for success.

Track affiliate links 

Affiliates bring in traffic, but it’s up to you to turn visitors into buyers. AI can help you track which affiliate links drive the most sales, so you can refine your strategy and grow your business. Here’s how to make your shop more affiliate-friendly:

  • Use link tracking to see which affiliates bring in the most engaged customers.
  • Make product links easy to find by placing banners and call-to-action buttons where they naturally fit.
  • Create a seamless checkout experience so visitors can complete their purchases quickly, no matter what device they’re using.

Affiliate search engine optimization (SEO) techniques 

Affiliate marketing works even better when your store appears in search results. Optimizing product pages helps influence organic traffic and makes affiliate promotions even stronger. Key tactics include:

  • Optimizing product descriptions: Use natural keywords to match how customers search.
  • Creating high-quality content: Affiliate-friendly blogs, FAQs, and comparison pages can attract organic traffic.
  • Improving site speed: Fast-loading pages reduce bounce rates and keep visitors engaged.

Use AI to improve user experience

A great affiliate program starts with a great experience for your customers. AI-powered tools help you understand their behavior, so you can recommend products they’ll love. They also personalize offers based on browsing history and highlight areas that need improvement — like slow-loading pages or high cart abandonment — so you can create a smoother, more rewarding shopping experience.

Build an AI-powered store that grows with your business

Create an optimized storefront with built-in AI, automated marketing, and secure payment options — all designed for small businesses.

Check it out

Track affiliate performance with AI

Tracking affiliate performance isn’t just about counting sales — it’s about understanding which partners bring in the most valuable customers, which promotions work best, and where there’s room to improve. Instead of relying on spreadsheets or manual reports, AI can help you analyze real-time data, identify patterns, and optimize your affiliate program with confidence.

Focus on the right metrics

Not all clicks lead to sales, and not all sales bring long-term value. The most important metrics to track include:

  • Conversion rate: How often do clicks from affiliate links turn into purchases? A high conversion rate usually means an affiliate is reaching the right audience.
  • Average order value (AOV): Do affiliate-referred customers spend more per order? Tracking AOV helps identify high-value partners.
  • Customer lifetime value (CLV): Are affiliate-driven customers making repeat purchases, or do they only buy once? Affiliates bringing in loyal customers are worth investing in.
  • Engagement rate: Are affiliate promotions driving meaningful interactions? High engagement suggests strong audience trust.

Let AI handle performance analysis

Sifting through reports manually takes time, and it’s easy to miss important insights. AI-powered analytics can help you ‌identify top-performing affiliates and suggest increased commissions or exclusive offers. And detect fraudulent activity, like fake clicks or duplicate transactions. You can also predict which affiliates will likely generate long-term customers based on past behavior. All great performance metrics to let AI handle.

See results from day one with a CRM designed for SMBs — the all-in-one suite for productivity. It all starts with Starter Suite.

Maintain trust and compliance in affiliate marketing

Affiliate marketing relies on trust — Salesforce’s number one value. Ethical marketing and data protection help keep your program credible and compliant.

Regulations like the Federal Trade Commission (FTC)’s disclosure rules require affiliates to clearly state when they earn commissions. Disclosures should be easy to find, and promotions must be truthful. If affiliates receive free products, they must say so upfront. A CRM for small businesses helps you share compliance guidelines and monitor content.

Privacy laws like General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) in Europe and the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) require transparency in data collection. An AI-powered CRM can help track permissions, secure customer data, and flag compliance risks. AI also scans affiliate content for missing disclosures and misleading claims, helping you maintain trust while protecting your business. (Back to top.)
